sentence: 他练习跳水已经有五年了。
pinyin: Tā liàn xí tiào shuǐ yǐ jīng yǒu wǔ nián le.
english: He has been practicing diving for five years.

meaning: to increase revenue; to increase income by (x amount); to levy (a surc
sentence: 农民通过种植新品种来增收。
pinyin: Nóng mín tōng guò zhòng zhí xīn pǐn zhǒng lái zēng shōu.
english: Farmers increase their income by growing new crop varieties.

sentence: 他能用流利的英语与外国客人交谈。
pinyin: Tā néng yòng liúlì de Yīngyǔ yǔ wàiguó kèrén jiāotán.
english: He can converse with foreign guests in fluent English.

sentence: 教室里有一排新桌子。
pinyin: Jiàoshì lǐ yǒu yī pái xīn zhuōzi.
english: There is a row of new desks in the classroom.

sentence: 服务器需要处理大量的数据流。
pinyin: Fúwùqì xūyào chǔlǐ dàliàng de shùjùliú.
english: The server needs to process a large volume of data streams.

sentence: 这座建筑颇具历史价值。
pinyin: Zhè zuò jiànzhú pō jù lìshǐ jiàzhí.
english: This building has considerable historical value.

sentence: 一位教士在教堂门口迎接信徒。
pinyin: Yī wèi jiàoshì zài jiàotáng ménkǒu yíngjiē xìntú.
english: A clergyman welcomed the congregation at the church door.

sentence: 他骑着三轮车去买菜。
pinyin: Tā qízhe sānlúnchē qù mǎicài.
english: He rides a tricycle to buy groceries.

sentence: 热带气旋带来了强风和暴雨。
pinyin: Rèdài qìxuán dài lái le qiángfēng hé bàoyǔ.
english: The tropical cyclone brought strong winds and heavy rain.

meaning: 1. minister; 2. diplomat performing ambassadorial role in Qing times,
sentence: 他被任命为驻外公使，即将出发。
pinyin: Tā bèi rènmìng wéi zhùwài gōngshǐ, jíjiāng chūfā.
english: He was appointed as a foreign minister and is about to depart.

sentence: 办公室里的座机响了很久没人接。
pinyin: Bàngōngshì lǐ de zuòjī xiǎng le hěn jiǔ méi rén jiē.
english: The landline in the office rang for a long time but nobody answered.

sentence: 实验室正在制备新型催化剂样品。
pinyin: Shíyànshì zhèngzài zhìbèi xīnxíng cuīhuàjì yàngpǐn.
english: The laboratory is preparing samples of a new type of catalyst.

sentence: 入境旅客须接受检疫检查。
pinyin: Rùjìng lǚkè xū jiēshòu jiǎnyì jiǎnchá.
english: Incoming travelers must undergo quarantine inspection.

meaning: 1. email; 2. abbr. for 電子郵件|电子邮件[diàn zǐ yóu jiàn]
sentence: 请把报告发电邮给我。
pinyin: Qǐng bǎ bàogào fā diànyóu gěi wǒ.
english: Please send the report to me by email.

sentence: 她在群里跟大家说“安安”。
pinyin: Tā zài qún lǐ gēn dàjiā shuō “ān'ān”.
english: She greeted everyone with 'an'an' in the group chat.

meaning: 1. tonnage; 2. class in tons (of a passenger ship)
sentence: 这艘船属于万吨级货轮。
pinyin: Zhè sōu chuán shǔyú wàn dūnjí huòlún.
english: This ship is a ten-thousand-ton class freighter.

sentence: 心脏是循环系统的核心器官。
pinyin: Xīnzàng shì xúnhuán xìtǒng de héxīn qìguān.
english: The heart is the central organ of the circulatory system.

sentence: 这栋建筑的地板用的是大理石。
pinyin: Zhè dòng jiànzhú de dìbǎn yòng de shì dàlǐshí.
english: The floor of this building is made of marble.

sentence: 我姐夫昨天送我去机场。
pinyin: Wǒ jiěfu zuótiān sòng wǒ qù jīchǎng.
english: My older sister's husband drove me to the airport yesterday.

meaning: 1. artistic mood or conception; 2. creative concept
sentence: 这首诗的意境非常深远。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu shī de yìjìng fēicháng shēnyuǎn.
english: The artistic mood of this poem is very profound.

meaning: 1. to enter the army; 2. to enlist
sentence: 他十八岁就选择入伍，参军报国。
pinyin: Tā shíbā suì jiù xuǎnzé rùwǔ, cānjūn bàoguó.
english: He chose to enlist in the military at eighteen to serve his country.

meaning: 1. to fly across; 2. to fly over; 3. to fly past; 4. (literary) (of on
sentence: 飞机飞越山脉时遇到了气流。
pinyin: Fēijī fēiyuè shānmài shí yùdào le qìliú.
english: The plane encountered turbulence while flying over the mountain range.

sentence: 工人把货物装载到卡车上。
pinyin: Gōngrén bǎ huòwù zhuāngzài dào kǎchē shàng.
english: Workers loaded the goods onto the truck.

meaning: 1. bag or purse etc; 2. small bump or pimple; 3. hillock
sentence: 她的包包里装满了各种东西。
pinyin: Tā de bāobao lǐ zhuāng mǎn le gè zhǒng dōngxi.
english: Her bag is stuffed full of all kinds of things.

sentence: 这部剧讲述了一位女皇的故事。
pinyin: Zhè bù jù jiǎngshù le yī wèi nǚhuáng de gùshi.
english: This drama tells the story of an empress.

meaning: 1. the feeling that sth is genuine; 2. sense of reality; 3. in the fle
sentence: 这款游戏的画面真实感很强。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn yóuxì de huàmiàn zhēnshígǎn hěn qiáng.
english: The graphics in this game have a very strong sense of realism.

sentence: 这片建筑群建于上个世纪初。
pinyin: Zhè piàn jiànzhùqún jiàn yú shàng gè shìjì chū.
english: This cluster of buildings was built at the beginning of the last century.

sentence: 外面下着小雨，记得带伞。
pinyin: Wàimiàn xià zhe xiǎoyǔ, jìde dài sǎn.
english: It's drizzling outside; remember to bring an umbrella.

sentence: 旧时官府常常拉夫充当劳役。
pinyin: Jiùshí guānfǔ chángcháng lāfū chōngdāng láoyì.
english: In the old days, authorities would often press-gang men into forced labor.

sentence: 这条路是单向通行的。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo lù shì dānxiàng tōngxíng de.
english: This road is one-way traffic only.

sentence: 我家的网络带宽不够用。
pinyin: Wǒ jiā de wǎngluò dàikuān bú gòu yòng.
english: The internet bandwidth at my home is not enough.

sentence: 夏天没有风扇真的很难熬。
pinyin: Xiàtiān méiyǒu fēngshàn zhēn de hěn nán áo.
english: Summer without an electric fan is really unbearable.

sentence: 委员会将对方案进行评议。
pinyin: Wěiyuánhuì jiāng duì fāng'àn jìnxíng píngyì.
english: The committee will appraise and discuss the proposal.

sentence: 历史上的君王都有自己的烦恼。
pinyin: Lìshǐ shàng de jūnwáng dōu yǒu zìjǐ de fánnǎo.
english: Rulers throughout history all had their own worries.

sentence: 她是混血儿，父亲是日本人。
pinyin: Tā shì hùnxuè'ér, fùqīn shì Rìběn rén.
english: She is of mixed blood; her father is Japanese.

sentence: 请仔细核查一下这份数据。
pinyin: Qǐng zǐxì héchá yīxià zhè fèn shùjù.
english: Please carefully verify this set of data.

sentence: 他家装了卫星电视，频道很多。
pinyin: Tā jiā zhuāng le wèixīng diànshì, píndào hěn duō.
english: His family installed satellite TV and has many channels.

sentence: 这位学妹刚入学，需要多关照。
pinyin: Zhè wèi xuémèi gāng rùxué, xūyào duō guānzhào.
english: This junior female schoolmate just enrolled and needs more guidance.

meaning: 1. fish head; 2. fig. upright and unwilling to compromise
sentence: 妈妈最喜欢吃剁椒鱼头。
pinyin: Māma zuì xǐhuān chī duòjiāo yútóu.
english: Mom loves eating steamed fish head with chopped chilies.

sentence: 遥感技术可以监测森林火灾。
pinyin: Yáogǎn jìshù kěyǐ jiāncè sēnlín huǒzāi.
english: Remote sensing technology can monitor forest fires.

sentence: 这条新闻的可信度值得怀疑。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo xīnwén de kěxìndù zhídé huáiyí.
english: The credibility of this news report is questionable.

sentence: 图书馆里收藏了大量珍贵古籍。
pinyin: Túshūguǎn lǐ shōucáng le dàliàng zhēnguì gǔjí.
english: The library houses a large collection of precious ancient texts.

sentence: 语言会随时代不断演进。
pinyin: Yǔyán huì suí shídài bùduàn yǎnjìn.
english: Language evolves continuously with the times.

sentence: 他是我的教父，对我很好。
pinyin: Tā shì wǒ de jiàofù, duì wǒ hěn hǎo.
english: He is my godfather and treats me very well.

sentence: 他梦想有一天住在海岛上。
pinyin: Tā mèngxiǎng yǒu yītiān zhù zài hǎidǎo shàng.
english: He dreams of living on an island someday.

meaning: 1. to connect; 2. to join; 3. to assemble
sentence: 两根管子在这里接合在一起。
pinyin: Liǎng gēn guǎnzi zài zhèlǐ jiēhé zài yīqǐ.
english: The two pipes are joined together here.

meaning: 1. to depart from; 2. to deviate from; 3. deviation
sentence: 他的做法背离了公司的原则。
pinyin: Tā de zuòfǎ bèilí le gōngsī de yuánzé.
english: His approach deviated from the company's principles.

sentence: 近亲之间不应该结婚。
pinyin: Jìnqīn zhī jiān bù yīnggāi jiéhūn.
english: Close relatives should not marry each other.

sentence: 政府严正声明绝不妥协。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ yánzhèng shēngmíng jué bù tuǒxié.
english: The government solemnly declared it would never compromise.

meaning: 1. to spend effort; 2. to take trouble; 3. May I trouble you to...? (a
sentence: 麻烦您费神帮我看一下合同。
pinyin: Máfan nín fèishén bāng wǒ kàn yīxià hétong.
english: May I trouble you to take a look at the contract for me.
